text:
is a Giant Monstrous Being that appears in the episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z. Originally it was the Evangelion Unit-01 statue located in the real life ' in Kyoto, Japan. It was turned into a monster by Valtom but it goes berserk, even beyond Valtom's control, and disappears. Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z - Episode 21 

Profile

Taking the form of a Japanese , the overall shape is similar with the Evangelion Unit-01, with various altered parts like having toes in the feet, claws in the tips of the fingers, longer and pointy teeth and another changes in the armor guard to be more pointy like the ankles, knee guards and elbows. The back of Oni EVA also does have the shape of the Unit-01 head, with the umbilical cable being similar to a tongue.

In the Beast Mode, it grows even more protrusions in the arms, in a shape of a long bladed that is able to get hold of the E5 Shinkalion. The legs are also able to invert the position of the lower limbs, being able to crawl and move even faster with the four members.
